findings.recommendation: Apply 'rules not stories' principle: remove or collapse Agent Development Use Cases (133 lines of tutorial-style script-vs-agent-intelligence guidance), Example End-to-End Workflow (42 lines of step-by-step tutorial), Success Metrics (15 lines of explanatory checklist), and Quality Standards Enforcement (23 lines restating what dev/qa subagent docs already enforce). JSON Storage Policy and Integration with /clean (30 combined lines) are borderline — collapse to 2-3 bullet rules each if retained. Target reduction: 243 lines (16.1% -> ~5%). Reference: convert.md cleanup (commit 2d21631) reduced 113 lines (-22%) by removing similar verbose sections. Note: pre-existing violation, not introduced in this diff.

Apply 'rules not stories' principle: collapse Common Anti-Patterns to Avoid (63 lines of annotated bad/good code blocks) into a 5-6 bullet list of forbidden patterns — the prescriptive rule is the constraint, not the annotated code pair. Remove or halve Example Execution (Canonical Surgical Fix) (52 lines); a single 10-15 line skeleton is sufficient to illustrate surgical-fix form. Target reduction: 115 lines (11.6% -> ~5%). Note: Common Anti-Patterns was assessed as borderline (prescriptive rules vs. tutorial format); retained as verbose because annotated code pairs with explanatory prose exceed the 30-line template threshold. Reference: convert.md cleanup (commit 2d21631). Note: pre-existing violation, not introduced in this diff.
findings.self_review_note: Common Anti-Patterns to Avoid is a borderline case: the section contains prescriptive forbidden-pattern rules illustrated with code. It is retained as verbose because the format (annotated bad/good code pairs with prose) exceeds the 30-line example template threshold and the prescriptive content can be expressed as bullet rules without losing functional value.

findings.recommendation: Apply 'rules not stories' principle: reduce Example Execution (72 lines with full JSON inputs and step-by-step verification narrative) to a 15-20 line skeleton showing only structure, not narration. Target reduction: 72 lines (3.9% -> ~1%). Reference: convert.md cleanup (commit 2d21631). Note: pre-existing violation, not introduced in this diff.

summary.estimated_reduction: 243 lines from commands/dev.md (target ~5%), 115 lines from agents/dev.md (target ~5%), 72 lines from agents/qa.md (target ~1%)
summary.diff_cleanliness_verdict: PASS — no new verbosity violations were introduced in this diff. All three findings are pre-existing (introduced_in_diff: false). Per AC-12.1 Mechanism ii and default-safe rule: pre-existing findings are advisory and non-blocking for cleanliness CLOSE.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex CLI was invoked and returned approximately 207.8KB of output. The output consisted primarily of file content reads (nl -ba and sed commands on source files) and git status inspection without reaching a structured CODEX_FEEDBACK section before the session context limit was hit. No parseable CODEX_FEEDBACK list was produced.

self_review.q1_false_positives: agents/dev.md ## Common Anti-Patterns to Avoid was assessed for false positive risk. The section contains prescriptive forbidden-pattern rules with annotated bad/good code blocks. Determination: retained as verbose — the prescriptive value can be expressed as bullet rules without the annotated code pairs; the format exceeds the 30-line template threshold.
self_review.q2_line_count_accuracy: commands/dev.md: 243 verbose lines, threshold 200. Both the line-count trigger (243 >= 200) and the percentage trigger (16.1% > 15%) fire. Severity CRITICAL confirmed. agents/dev.md: 115 lines, threshold 100. Line-count trigger fires (115 >= 100), percentage is 11.6% < 15% so percentage trigger does not fire. Severity MAJOR by line count confirmed. agents/qa.md: 72 lines, 3.9%. MINOR confirmed.
self_review.q3_severity_calibration: All three severity assignments verified against thresholds. No mis-classification found.
self_review.q4_scope_accuracy: 15 non-documentation files correctly excluded (hooks/*.py, scripts/*.py, tests/*.py). commands/spec-update.md and commands/push.md correctly cleared (no verbose pattern triggered, all sections are operational).
self_review.q5_introduced_in_diff: Git diff analysis of commits 4991a9d and 9c7fd8c confirmed that the verbose section headers (## Agent Development Use Cases, ## Example Execution, ## Common Anti-Patterns to Avoid, etc.) were not added in this cycle's diff. All three violations are pre-existing. introduced_in_diff: false on all findings.
